title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
